parameters.content:
## Shared Error Handler — Community Hub Scope Only

**Opt-in routing:** this workflow only fires for workflows that explicitly reference its id via `settings.errorWorkflow`. The Error Trigger node does NOT broadcast-receive from other workflows on the same n8n instance.

**Defensive allowlist:** the `Scope Check` node additionally filters on workflow name against the community-hub allowlist below. Any failure from a workflow outside this list is silently dropped — so accidental or copy-paste wiring from unrelated workflows can't spam `#integration-marketplace`. Update the allowlist in the Scope Check node when adding new community-hub workflows.

**Behaviour:** formats a concise Slack message with the failed workflow's name, the failing node, the error message, and a link to the execution in the n8n UI — then posts it to `#integration-marketplace`.

Strapi side-effects (e.g. marking a stuck scan as failed) are handled by `scan-timeout-sweeper`, not here — keeps the error handler's dependencies minimal so it rarely fails itself.

nodes.name: Scope Check
nodes.notes: Allowlist filter. Update the ALLOWLIST when adding new workflows to the community-hub scope.

assignments.name: text

nodes.name: Post to #integration-marketplace
nodes.notes: If Slack is down the alert is silently dropped — no cascading failures. Execution history in n8n still records the error.
